zh.lifeSummary: 當William Torrington於1170年出生在英國英格蘭戴文格亞特 托林頓時，他的父親William de Torrington II36歲，母親Baroness Mary of Torrington48歲。他於大約1183年與Mrs. William de Torrington在英國英格蘭戴文格亞特 托林頓結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Torrington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name, mainly from Black, Great, or Little Torrington (Devon).

2 English: in Lincs and E Anglia from East or West Torrington (Lincs), recorded as Terintone in 1086 and Tiringtuna about 1115, or from Terrington (Norfolk), recorded as Tirintuna between 1103 and 1131.

variants.name: Tarrington
meanings: 1  English: locative name, variant of   Torrington  .

2  English: locative name, perhaps sometimes from Tarrington (Herefs), but there is no clear link between the 1379 example and the 18th-century Staffs and Lancs name cited below, which may instead belong with (1).

variants.name: Terrington
meanings: 1  English: locative name, in S Lincs and E Anglia a variant of   Torrington   (2).
2  English: locative name in N England from Terrington (NR Yorks).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Torrington was born in 1170, in Great Torrington, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Torrington II, was 36 and his mother, Baroness Mary of Torrington, was 48. He married Mrs. William de Torrington about 1183, in Great Torrington, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Torrington est né en 1170, à Great Torrington, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Torrington II, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Baroness Mary of Torrington, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. William de Torrington environ 1183, à Great Torrington, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles.

ko.lifeSummary: William Torrington(이)가 1170년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 그리트 토링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Torrington II(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Baroness Mary of Torrington(은)는 48세였다. 그는 대략 1183년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 그리트 토링턴에서 Mrs. William de Torrington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Torrington родился в 1170 г. в местности грит торрингтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Torrington II было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Mary of Torrington, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. William de Torrington около 1183 г. в местности грит торрингтон, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери.
